title: Usopp Says Goodbye to Kaya
description: On pages 6–9, Syrup Village moves from battle to farewell as Usopp, Kaya, and the Straw Hats decide what comes after Kuro’s defeat.
scene: The danger has passed, but the emotional weight remains: Usopp must choose between staying with the village that knows his lies and chasing the sea like his father.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's just a prelude to the upcoming great adventures

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've been waiting for you... it's slightly old style but I designed it myself

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's a caraved and it uses a staysail... the controls are in the back

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So it is you who defeated the KURO-Neko Pirates with usopp-kun

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought you'd be a little bigger...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I will explain the steering system...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: First of all, in order to adjust the yards in relation to the crew garnet...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't explain it to him, I'll listen to the explanation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I had every- thing you would need for a voyage loaded on to the ship

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Shanks for causing all this trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's "for going through all this trouble"...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think we should stop him... if he keeps on going like that, he'll hit the ship

summary: This part closes Syrup Village by turning Usopp’s lies into a bittersweet farewell, while Kaya’s gift helps the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
